name: Lawyer's Pen
effect: Mimic props have infiltrated the map.
unlock: On or after round 20, red candles can be found in a Cabin between Ashwood and Blackwater Lake, next to Juggernog in Ashwood, and in the bedroom of the Farmhouse. Shoot all three with a weapon equipped with the Napalm Ammo Mod or a Molotov Cocktail. After doing so, interact with the Relic Portal on the side of the barn.
